title: INVITATION FOR BIDS: Drywall Systems Removal and Replacement - Shkwéngen Apartments
summary: Sealed bid for removal and replacement of approximately 60,000 square feet of asbestos-containing drywall systems across three apartment buildings with 27 residential units at Shkwéngen Apartments in Dowagiac, Michigan.
